languages.text: {n}Техножрица степенно простирает мехадендриты, причудливо складывая их в знаке приветствия.{/n} "Лорд-капитан. Благословенный машинный дух, обитающий в троне, угасает. Я и многие скорбящие техножрецы денно и нощно проводим над святыней таинства техноврачевания и молебны эксплуатационного благоденствия, но даже наши радения лишь откладывают неизбежное".

{n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."
languages.original_text: {n}Техножрица степенно простирает мехадендриты, причудливо складывая их в знаке приветствия.{/n} "Лорд-капитан. Благословенный машинный дух, обитающий в троне, угасает. Я и многие скорбящие техножрецы денно и нощно проводим над святыней таинства техноврачевания и молебны эксплуатационного благоденствия, но даже наши радения лишь откладывают неизбежное".

The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

{n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

languages.text: {n}La technoprêtresse déploie lentement ses mécadendrites, les intriquant dans un geste de salutation.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. L'esprit de la machine béni qui réside dans le fauteuil disparaît peu à peu. Avec de nombreux autres technoprêtres affligés, nous avons accompli d'interminables sacrements de technoguérison et récité des prières pour obtenir des bénédictions opérationnelles sur cet autel. Cependant, notre dévotion n'a fait que repousser l'inévitable. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

traits.locale_text: {n}La technoprêtresse déploie lentement ses mécadendrites, les intriquant dans un geste de salutation.{/n} « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}. L'esprit de la machine béni qui réside dans le fauteuil disparaît peu à peu. Avec de nombreux autres technoprêtres affligés, nous avons accompli d'interminables sacrements de technoguérison et récité des prières pour obtenir des bénédictions opérationnelles sur cet autel. Cependant, notre dévotion n'a fait que repousser l'inévitable. »

languages.text: {n}Die Techpriesterin fährt langsam ihre Mechadendriten aus und formt sie zu einem umständlichen Gruß.{/n} "Lord Captain. Der gesegnete Maschinengeist des Throns schwindet. Ich selbst und viele trauernde Techpriester haben dem Schrein zahllose Sakramente der Tech-Heilung gespendet und Gebete der operativen Benediktion gesprochen, aber selbst unsere Hingabe vermag das Unausweichliche nur zu verzögern."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Techpriesterin fährt langsam ihre Mechadendriten aus und formt sie zu einem umständlichen Gruß.{/n} "Lord Captain. Der gesegnete Maschinengeist des Throns schwindet. Ich selbst und viele trauernde Techpriester haben dem Schrein zahllose Sakramente der Tech-Heilung gespendet und Gebete der operativen Benediktion gesprochen, aber selbst unsere Hingabe vermag das Unausweichliche nur zu verzögern."

languages.text: {n}那位技术神甫缓缓伸出她的机械触须，交织成一个复杂的问候手势。{/n}“舰长大人，栖居在王座内的神圣机魂正在消逝。我与众多悲伤的技术神甫一直在这圣坛上无休止地执行技术疗愈圣礼和运转祝福祈祷，但即便如此，我们的虔诚也仅能稍稍延缓那注定到来的一刻。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

traits.locale_text: {n}那位技术神甫缓缓伸出她的机械触须，交织成一个复杂的问候手势。{/n}“舰长大人，栖居在王座内的神圣机魂正在消逝。我与众多悲伤的技术神甫一直在这圣坛上无休止地执行技术疗愈圣礼和运转祝福祈祷，但即便如此，我们的虔诚也仅能稍稍延缓那注定到来的一刻。”

languages.text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa extiende sus mecadendritas en un complejo gesto de saludo.{/n} «Lord Capitán, el bendito espíritu máquina que mora en el trono se está desvaneciendo. Muchos otros tecnosacerdotes y yo hemos estado aplicando sin cesar los sacramentos de tecnosanación y las plegarias de bendición operativa, pero nuestra devoción no logra más que posponer lo inevitable».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

traits.locale_text: {n}La tecnosacerdotisa extiende sus mecadendritas en un complejo gesto de saludo.{/n} «Lord Capitán, el bendito espíritu máquina que mora en el trono se está desvaneciendo. Muchos otros tecnosacerdotes y yo hemos estado aplicando sin cesar los sacramentos de tecnosanación y las plegarias de bendición operativa, pero nuestra devoción no logra más que posponer lo inevitable».

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip, karmaşık bir selamlama hareketiyle mekadentritlerini yavaşça uzatıp kıvırıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan. Tahtın içinde yaşayan kutsal makine ruhu sönüyor. Ben ve kederli birçok Tekno Rahip; bu tapınakta bitmek bilmeyen tekno şifa ayinleri gerçekleştiriyor, operasyonel lütuf duaları ediyoruz ancak bizim ibadetlerimiz bile yalnızca kaçınılmazı geciktiriyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tekno Rahip, karmaşık bir selamlama hareketiyle mekadentritlerini yavaşça uzatıp kıvırıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan. Tahtın içinde yaşayan kutsal makine ruhu sönüyor. Ben ve kederli birçok Tekno Rahip; bu tapınakta bitmek bilmeyen tekno şifa ayinleri gerçekleştiriyor, operasyonel lütuf duaları ediyoruz ancak bizim ibadetlerimiz bile yalnızca kaçınılmazı geciktiriyor."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストはゆっくりと機械腕を伸ばし、複雑な挨拶のジェスチャーでそれをねじります。{/n}「ロード・キャプテン卿。この聖座に宿る機械霊は衰えつつあります。私は多くの悲しむテクプリストと共に、この聖域に絶え間ないテクヒーリングの儀式と稼働の祝福の祈りを捧げていますが、私たちの信仰もまた、避けられない運命を止めることしかできません。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest slowly extends her mechadendrites, twisting them in an intricate gesture of greeting.{/n} "Lord Captain. The blessed machine spirit that dwells within the throne is fading. I and many grieving Tech-Priests have been performing unending sacraments of tech-healing and prayers of operational benediction on this shrine, but even our devotions are merely staving off the inevitable."
